T0183.title: Full Household Text Record
T0183.definition: In illicit data trading, within the context of record-checking services, this refers to a complete textual description of all members listed in a household register, including relatives’ names and national ID numbers.
T0183.description: In illicit data trading, used in the record-checking context, this refers to the full written record of household registration members. It includes detailed text-based information such as the names and ID numbers of all relatives in the household.
T0183.usageExample: “Full text with relationship details, supports Chunjiang guarantee verification.”
